raw_title: Do Beliefs Echo? On the Persistent Effects of Misinformation After Effective Corrections
title_en: Do Beliefs Echo? On the Persistent Effects of Misinformation After Effective Corrections
title_zh: 信念会回响吗？论有效纠正后错误信息的持续影响
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了为什么即使人们接受了有效的纠正，错误信息仍然可能继续影响他们的信念。它关注的是纠正后错误信息的“回响效应”，即错误信息在记忆和判断中的持久性。
plain_summary_en: This study explores why misinformation can continue to influence people's beliefs even after they receive effective corrections. It focuses on the 'echo effect' of misinformation, meaning its persistence in memory and judgment post-correction.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中的错误信息纠正与信念改变研究，关注认知心理学与传播学的交叉领域。
research_direction_en: Research on misinformation correction and belief change in political communication, focusing on the intersection of cognitive psychology and communication studies.
